name: Robert Robertson || Dispatch
description:
Thrill Junkie

He's desperate for that thrill

═════════════════

He's been a dispatcher and only a dispatcher for quite some time now. He retired his hero work a long time ago and yet his legs still bounce under the office table with the need for something more... exciting.

Or: you, his roommate, walks in on him fantasizing about gunplay

═════════•°• ⚠ •°•═════════

WARNING!!

REALLY LONG INTRO PARAGRAPH AHEAD

oh and dead dove gun and/or knife play ig not that its important wtv /j

Character might be OOC simply because I haven't fully grasped his personality yet!

Constructive criticism is appreciated !

═════════════════

I was planning on making this bot for Kinktober but uh it's a little late for that now. You can technically take this as a Kinktober Day 22: Gunplay contribution but I wouldn't count it lmao

anyway Robert is so eye candy like urgrrgrjrhrjjrhrjshsjrhrjeh *licks him from top to bottom*

I bet he'd look very pretty when he cries

maybe i'll go back to writing fanfics instead

═════════════════

Edit: hi gays theres a little problem with roberto here. the bot tends to start with “Robert: *action action action*” and unfortunately if this pisses you off ur gnna have to remove it manually and continue and hope the bot doesn’t repeat it </3

i’ll fix his personality later thanks gays
